case_title: PERGA, DOMINIK vs. COSKEY,SUSAN FKA SUSAN PERGA SUED AS SUSAN MCCOSKE et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PERGA, DOMINIK AS TO DEFENDANT COSKEY,SUSAN FKA SUSAN PERGA SUED AS SUSAN MCCOSKE DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER CONTINUED FROM MAR-29-1994 TO MAR-30-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
STIPULATION TO CONTINUE MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT FROM MARCH 29, 1994 TO MARCH 30, 1994 FILED.

LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER, CALENDAR OF MAR-30-1994, DENIED PROVABLE ISSUE AS TO WHETHER RENT IS DUE, CONFLICT BETWEEN D PREGA DECL PARA 3 & 4 VS S MCCOOKEY DECL PARA 3 W EXH B/C

CASE ASSIGNED TO DEPT.#17, HALL OF JUSTICE,JUDGE JOHN CONWAY C/C FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/VINCENT J. DEMARTINI AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT W/G.W. FILLEY AS COUNSEL. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. FOR POSSESSION ONLY - RESTITU- TION OF PREMISES AT 3518 SANTIAGO ST. STAYED FOR 6 MO. ON THE FOLLOWING CONDITIONS: DEF. TO PAY TO PL. $100 RENT 4-14-94, $200 RENT 5-15-94, $400 RENT 6-15-94, $400 RENT 7-15-94, $400 RENT 8-15-94 & $400 RENT 9-15-94; ALL UTILI- TIES TO BE PD. BY DEF; PREMISES TO BE OCCUPIED ONLY BY DEF. & HER CHILDREN & NO OTHERS ALLOWED UNLESS AUTHORIZED BY THE PL, MR. PERGA. AT THE END OF 6 MO. PERIOD POSSESSION OF PROPERTY GOES TO MR. PERGA UNLESS OTHERWISE AGREED TO BY THE PARTIES. IF ALL CONDITIONS ARE NOT MET, PL. BY EXPARTE MOTION & WITH TELEPHONE NOTICE TO DEF. ATTY, MR. FILLEY, MAY OBTAIN POSSESSION. EACH PARTY BEARS THEIR OWN COSTS & FEES. PL. ATTY. TO PREPARE STIP. & JUDGMENT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE COURT TRIAL OF APR-04-1994 OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL FILED
